data.body: Worktree .claude/worktrees/foliaged-merry-collie on branch worktree-foliaged-merry-collie, ff'd to origin/main c005f242b. venv+hooks+commit-msg installed. Gates all ON, API key present. Plan: stack order #4 G5 -> #1 plan-impact -> #2 recall -> #5 thresholds -> #6 code-impact -> #7 nit/detector -> #8 data-capture -> #3 rollout/calibration. Each child: review-plan -> claim -> implement -> test -> commit (stacked, rebar-ticket trailer) -> close (completion-verifier). Then push stack to gerrit refs/for/main, get LLM-Review+Verified green, submit.
